obverse.description: Laureate bust of King Frederik III in ornate plate armor, wearing ermine sash, neck scarf, and collar of the Order of the Elephant.
obverse.lettering: FRIDER · III · D · G · DAN NOR · VAN · GOT · REX ·
obverse.unabridged_legend: Fridericus III, Dei gratia, Daniae, Norvegiae, Vandalorumque, Gothoruque rex.
obverse.lettering_translation: Frederick III, by the grace of God, King of Denmark, Norway, the Wends, and the Goths.

reverse.description: Coats of arms of Sweden, Norway, and Denmark on oval shields. Crown of Denmark above. Long cross pattée of Dannebrog behind with collar of the Order of the Elephant. 15 coats of arms of Danish provinces on small oval shields arranged in a circle around, clockwise: Kingdom of the Goths (Jutland), Kingdom of the Wends, Duchy of Schleswig, Duchy of Holstein, Duchy of Stormarn, Duchy of Dithmarschen, County of Oldenburg, County of Delmenhorst, Fehmarn Island, Bornholm Island, Gotland, Øsel Island, Faroe Islands, Iceland, and Greenland. Mint master initials below.
reverse.lettering:
DVX · SLES · HOL · STOR · DITM · COM · OLD & DELM
G K
reverse.unabridged_legend: Dux Slesvici, Holsatiae, Stormariae [et] Dithmarsiae, Comes Oldenburgii et Delmenhorstii. Gotfred Krüger.
reverse.lettering_translation: Duke of Schleswig, Holstein, Stormarn, and Dithmarschen, Count of Oldenburg and Delmenhorst.

edge.picture_copyright: Fritz Rudolf Künker GmbH & Co. KG, Osnabrück and Lübke & Wiedemann KG, Leonberg
